sections.paragraph:
verb לעקור

to remove, displace; move, move out; uproot, pluck, eradicate

verb להיעקר

be uprooted, plucked, eradicated; be castrated, emasculated

verb להיעקר

be removed, displaced

verb לעקר

to sterilize; castrate, emasculate

verb עוקר

be sterilized; be castrated, emasculated

verb להתעקר

become barren

verb לעקר (>>עיקר)

to sterilize

masculine noun and adjective

barren; sterile, infertile

masculine noun עקר (>>עיקר)

point, gist, essence, highlight, juice, kernel, meat, nub, pith, quintessence, rootstock, epitome; dogma, tenet; principle, fundamental, rudiment, element
